label: Formula 15.16b
section: Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction
nearby_text: mu_0 = 0$, $S_0 = 0$, and $S_t = S$ for $t \geq 1$. Equation 15.16a then gives $\Delta\mu_1 = \rho S$. Further iterations yield the increment from selection in generation $t$ to the total response as $$ \Delta\mu_{t}=\rho^{t}S $$ (15.16b) which (like epistasis) decreases in each generation, and approaches zero for large values of t. Hence, even under continued selection, the total response to selection eventually reaches a limit. Note

  "nearby_text": "mu_0 = 0$, $S_0 = 0$, and $S_t = S$ for $t \\geq 1$. Equation 15.16a then gives $\\Delta\\mu_1 = \\rho S$. Further iterations yield the increment from selection in generation $t$ to the total response as $$ \\Delta\\mu_{t}=\\rho^{t}S $$ (15.16b) which (like epistasis) decreases in each generation, and approaches zero for large values of t. Hence, even under continued selection, the total response to selection eventually reaches a limit. Note"
}

label: Formula 15.16c
section: Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction
nearby_text: ed on, and in general, only $ \rho^k $ of the response from generation $ t - k $ persists by generation $ t $. Summing over Equation 15.16b, the total response to selection after $ t $ generations is $$ \begin{align*}R(t)=\mu_t-\mu_0=\sum\limits_{i=1}^t\Delta\mu_i=S\sum\limits_{i=1}^t\rho^i\end{align*} $$ (15.16c)

      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",

        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",

        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",

  "nearby_text": "ed on, and in general, only $ \\rho^k $ of the response from generation $ t - k $ persists by generation $ t $. Summing over Equation 15.16b, the total response to selection after $ t $ generations is $$ \\begin{align*}R(t)=\\mu_t-\\mu_0=\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\Delta\\mu_i=S\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\rho^i\\end{align*} $$ (15.16c)"
}

label: Formula 15.17b
section: Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction
nearby_text: the case for epistasis, the total cumulative response reaches an equilibrium value representing the balance between the generation of correlations by selection and their removal by reproduction, with $$ \widetilde{R}=\lim_{t\to\infty}R(t)=S\frac{\rho}{1-\rho} $$ (15.17b)

label: Formula 15.18
section: Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction
nearby_text: esulting in $ S_t = S $, $ S_{t+\tau} = 0 $ for $ \tau \geq 1 $. If we substitute these values of $ S $ into Equation 15.16a and use Equation 15.16b, the expected change in generation $ t + \tau $ is $$ \Delta\mu_{t+\tau}=\rho^{\tau}\left(\Delta\mu_{t}-S\right)=\rho^{\tau}\left(\rho^{t}S-S\right)=-S\rho^{\tau}(1-\rho^{t}) $$ (15.18)

        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",

  "nearby_text": "esulting in $ S_t = S $, $ S_{t+\\tau} = 0 $ for $ \\tau \\geq 1 $. If we substitute these values of $ S $ into Equation 15.16a and use Equation 15.16b, the expected change in generation $ t + \\tau $ is $$ \\Delta\\mu_{t+\\tau}=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\Delta\\mu_{t}-S\\right)=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\rho^{t}S-S\\right)=-S\\rho^{\\tau}(1-\\rho^{t}) $$ (15.18)"
}

label: Formula 15.19a
section: Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction
nearby_text: Using this result, by generation $ t + \tau $, the cumulative response is $$ R(t+\tau)=R(t)+\sum_{i=1}^{\tau}\Delta\mu_{t+i}=R(t)-S\left(1-\rho^{t}\right)\sum_{i=1}^{\tau}\rho^{i}=\rho^{\tau}R(t) $$ (15.19a)

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.13b",
        "latex": "\\sum_{\\tau=1}^{t}\\left(\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}}\\right)^{\\tau}=\\frac{x(1-x^{t})}{1-x},\\quad\\mathrm{w h e r e}\\quad x=(1/2)^{i-1}",
        "label": "Formula 15.13b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",

      {
        "id": "formula_15.13c",
        "latex": "\\frac{x}{1-x}=\\frac{(1/2)^{i-1}}{1-(1/2)^{i-1}}=\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}-1}",
        "label": "Formula 15.13c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.14a",
        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid z_{m o},z_{f a}\\right]=\\mu+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{f a}-\\mu\\right)+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{m o}-\\mu\\right)",

        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.14b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}^{*}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.14b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 28,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.15",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.15",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 29,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 30,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16b",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t}=\\rho^{t}S",
        "label": "Formula 15.16b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 31,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16c",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}R(t)=\\mu_t-\\mu_0=\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\Delta\\mu_i=S\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\rho^i\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 32,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17a",
        "latex": "R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.17a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 33,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17b",
        "latex": "\\widetilde{R}=\\lim_{t\\to\\infty}R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}",
        "label": "Formula 15.17b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\widetilde{R}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.18",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t+\\tau}=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\Delta\\mu_{t}-S\\right)=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\rho^{t}S-S\\right)=-S\\rho^{\\tau}(1-\\rho^{t})",
        "label": "Formula 15.18",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "nearby_text": "Using this result, by generation $ t + \\tau $, the cumulative response is $$ R(t+\\tau)=R(t)+\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\Delta\\mu_{t+i}=R(t)-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=\\rho^{\\tau}R(t) $$ (15.19a)"
}

label: Formula 15.19b
section: Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction
nearby_text: step follows if we first note from Equation 15.17a that $  S(1 - \rho^t) = [(1 - \rho)/\rho] R(t)  $. Using this identity, and applying Equation 15.15b with $  x = \rho  $ and $  n = \tau  $, yields $$ -S\left(1-\rho^{t}\right)\sum_{i=1}^{\tau}\rho^{i}=-\left[R(t)\frac{1-\rho}{\rho}\right]\left[\frac{\rho(1-\rho^{\tau})}{1-\rho}\right]=-(1-\rho^{\tau})R(t) $$ (15.19b)

        "latex": "\\sum_{\\tau=1}^{t}\\left(\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}}\\right)^{\\tau}=\\frac{x(1-x^{t})}{1-x},\\quad\\mathrm{w h e r e}\\quad x=(1/2)^{i-1}",

        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid z_{m o},z_{f a}\\right]=\\mu+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{f a}-\\mu\\right)+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{m o}-\\mu\\right)",

        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}^{*}-\\mu\\right)",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.15",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.15",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 29,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",

      },
      {

        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 31,

      {
        "id": "formula_15.16c",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}R(t)=\\mu_t-\\mu_0=\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\Delta\\mu_i=S\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\rho^i\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16c",

        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 33,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17b",

      {

        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t+\\tau}=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\Delta\\mu_{t}-S\\right)=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\rho^{t}S-S\\right)=-S\\rho^{\\tau}(1-\\rho^{t})",
        "label": "Formula 15.18",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]

        "id": "formula_15.19a",
        "latex": "R(t+\\tau)=R(t)+\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\Delta\\mu_{t+i}=R(t)-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=\\rho^{\\tau}R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      }
    ]

  "nearby_text": "step follows if we first note from Equation 15.17a that $  S(1 - \\rho^t) = [(1 - \\rho)/\\rho] R(t)  $. Using this identity, and applying Equation 15.15b with $  x = \\rho  $ and $  n = \\tau  $, yields $$ -S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=-\\left[R(t)\\frac{1-\\rho}{\\rho}\\right]\\left[\\frac{\\rho(1-\\rho^{\\tau})}{1-\\rho}\\right]=-(1-\\rho^{\\tau})R(t) $$ (15.19b)"
}

label: Formula 15.19c
section: Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction
nearby_text: ve that Equation 15.19a converges to zero, with the rate of decay set by $ \rho $ (Figure 15.2). The half-life, $ t_{1/2} $, of the decay in response follows from solving $ \rho^{t_{1/2}} = 1/2 $, or $$ t_{1/2}=-\frac{\ln(2)}{\ln(\rho)} $$ (15.19c)

        "latex": "\\sum_{\\tau=1}^{t}\\left(\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}}\\right)^{\\tau}=\\frac{x(1-x^{t})}{1-x},\\quad\\mathrm{w h e r e}\\quad x=(1/2)^{i-1}",

        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.13c",
        "latex": "\\frac{x}{1-x}=\\frac{(1/2)^{i-1}}{1-(1/2)^{i-1}}=\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}-1}",

      },
      {

        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid z_{m o},z_{f a}\\right]=\\mu+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{f a}-\\mu\\right)+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{m o}-\\mu\\right)",

        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.14b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}^{*}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.14b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 28,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.15",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.15",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 29,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 30,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16b",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t}=\\rho^{t}S",
        "label": "Formula 15.16b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 31,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16c",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}R(t)=\\mu_t-\\mu_0=\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\Delta\\mu_i=S\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\rho^i\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 32,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17a",
        "latex": "R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.17a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 33,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17b",
        "latex": "\\widetilde{R}=\\lim_{t\\to\\infty}R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}",
        "label": "Formula 15.17b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\widetilde{R}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.18",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t+\\tau}=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\Delta\\mu_{t}-S\\right)=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\rho^{t}S-S\\right)=-S\\rho^{\\tau}(1-\\rho^{t})",
        "label": "Formula 15.18",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19a",
        "latex": "R(t+\\tau)=R(t)+\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\Delta\\mu_{t+i}=R(t)-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=\\rho^{\\tau}R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19b",
        "latex": "-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=-\\left[R(t)\\frac{1-\\rho}{\\rho}\\right]\\left[\\frac{\\rho(1-\\rho^{\\tau})}{1-\\rho}\\right]=-(1-\\rho^{\\tau})R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 37,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "S",
          "\\rho",
          "\\tau",
          "i",
          "t"
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "nearby_text": "ve that Equation 15.19a converges to zero, with the rate of decay set by $ \\rho $ (Figure 15.2). The half-life, $ t_{1/2} $, of the decay in response follows from solving $ \\rho^{t_{1/2}} = 1/2 $, or $$ t_{1/2}=-\\frac{\\ln(2)}{\\ln(\\rho)} $$ (15.19c)"
}

        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",

  "nearby_text": "rait in an individual can be decomposed as $ E = M + e $, comprised of a maternal performance component, M, contributed by the mother plus an environmental deviation, e, resulting in a trait value of $$ z=G+E=G+M+e $$ (15.20a)"

label: Formula 15.20b
section: SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS
nearby_text: Letting $ G_{d} $ denote the genotypic value of the direct effect (previously G), the phenotypic value of an individual can be written in terms of direct and maternal contributions $$ z=G+M+e=G_{d}+G_{m}+E_{m}+e $$ (15.20b)

      {

        "latex": "R_{A^{i}}(t)=S\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(A^{i})}{\\sigma_{z}^{2}}\\sum_{\\tau=1}^{t}\\left(\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}}\\right)^{\\tau}",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.13b",
        "latex": "\\sum_{\\tau=1}^{t}\\left(\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}}\\right)^{\\tau}=\\frac{x(1-x^{t})}{1-x},\\quad\\mathrm{w h e r e}\\quad x=(1/2)^{i-1}",

        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid z_{m o},z_{f a}\\right]=\\mu+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{f a}-\\mu\\right)+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{m o}-\\mu\\right)",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.14b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}^{*}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.14b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",

        "position": 28,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.15",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.15",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 29,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {

        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 31,

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16c",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}R(t)=\\mu_t-\\mu_0=\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\Delta\\mu_i=S\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\rho^i\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 32,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {

        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17b",
        "latex": "\\widetilde{R}=\\lim_{t\\to\\infty}R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}",

        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.18",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t+\\tau}=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\Delta\\mu_{t}-S\\right)=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\rho^{t}S-S\\right)=-S\\rho^{\\tau}(1-\\rho^{t})",
        "label": "Formula 15.18",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19a",
        "latex": "R(t+\\tau)=R(t)+\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\Delta\\mu_{t+i}=R(t)-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=\\rho^{\\tau}R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 36,

        "latex": "-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=-\\left[R(t)\\frac{1-\\rho}{\\rho}\\right]\\left[\\frac{\\rho(1-\\rho^{\\tau})}{1-\\rho}\\right]=-(1-\\rho^{\\tau})R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",

  "nearby_text": "Letting $ G_{d} $ denote the genotypic value of the direct effect (previously G), the phenotypic value of an individual can be written in terms of direct and maternal contributions $$ z=G+M+e=G_{d}+G_{m}+E_{m}+e $$ (15.20b)"

label: Formula 15.22a
section: SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS
subsection: Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model
nearby_text: reeding values in parents and offspring is multivariate normal and there is an absence of epistasis, the expected phenotypic value of an offspring whose mother has a phenotypic value of $ z_{mo} $ is $$ E\left[z_{o}\mid A_{mo},A_{fa},z_{mo}\right]=\frac{A_{mo}}{2}+\frac{A_{fa}}{2}+m z_{mo} $$ (15.22a) where $ A_{mo} $ and $ A_{fa} $ are the maternal and paternal breeding values. Averaging over the selected parents, the mean in generation t becomes $$ \mu_{z}(t+1)=\frac{A_{fa}^{*}(t)+A_{mo}^{*}(t)}

        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",

label: Formula 15.23b
section: SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS
subsection: Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model
nearby_text: The expected breeding value in the offspring is the average of the breeding values of the selected parents, which (from Equations 15.22c and 15.23a) yields $$ \mu_{A}(t+1)=\frac{A_{m o}^{*}(t)+A_{f a}^{*}(t)}{2}=\mu_{A}(t)+\frac{h^{2}}{2-m}\Biggl(S_{m o}(t)+S_{f a}(t)\Biggr) $$ (15.23b)

        "latex": "\\frac{x}{1-x}=\\frac{(1/2)^{i-1}}{1-(1/2)^{i-1}}=\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}-1}",

      {
        "id": "formula_15.14a",
        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid z_{m o},z_{f a}\\right]=\\mu+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{f a}-\\mu\\right)+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{m o}-\\mu\\right)",

      {

        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}^{*}-\\mu\\right)",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.15",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.15",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 29,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 30,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",

          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16b",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t}=\\rho^{t}S",
        "label": "Formula 15.16b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 31,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16c",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}R(t)=\\mu_t-\\mu_0=\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\Delta\\mu_i=S\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\rho^i\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 32,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17a",
        "latex": "R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.17a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 33,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17b",
        "latex": "\\widetilde{R}=\\lim_{t\\to\\infty}R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}",
        "label": "Formula 15.17b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\widetilde{R}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.18",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t+\\tau}=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\Delta\\mu_{t}-S\\right)=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\rho^{t}S-S\\right)=-S\\rho^{\\tau}(1-\\rho^{t})",
        "label": "Formula 15.18",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19a",
        "latex": "R(t+\\tau)=R(t)+\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\Delta\\mu_{t+i}=R(t)-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=\\rho^{\\tau}R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19b",
        "latex": "-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=-\\left[R(t)\\frac{1-\\rho}{\\rho}\\right]\\left[\\frac{\\rho(1-\\rho^{\\tau})}{1-\\rho}\\right]=-(1-\\rho^{\\tau})R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 37,

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {

        "latex": "z=G+E=G+M+e",

      {

        "latex": "z=G+M+e=G_{d}+G_{m}+E_{m}+e",

        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Decomposing Maternal Effects",
        "position": 42,

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.21",
        "latex": "z=G+M+e=G+m z_{m o}+e",
        "label": "Formula 15.21",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 43,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22a",
        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid A_{mo},A_{fa},z_{mo}\\right]=\\frac{A_{mo}}{2}+\\frac{A_{fa}}{2}+m z_{mo}",
        "label": "Formula 15.22a",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 44,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "E",

          "f",
          "m",
          "o",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{z}(t+1)=\\frac{A_{fa}^{*}(t)+A_{mo}^{*}(t)}{2}+m\\mu_{mo}^{*}(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.22b",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 45,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22c",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}A_{mo}^{*}(t)&=E_{s}[A_{mo}(t)]=E_{s}\\left[\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}\\left[z_{mo}-\\mu_{z}(t)\\right]+e\\right]\\\\&=\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}S_{mo}(t)\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.22c",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 46,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "m",
          "o",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.23a",
        "latex": "b_{A|z}=h^{2}\\frac{2}{2-m}",
        "label": "Formula 15.23a",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 47,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "b",
          "z"
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "nearby_text": "The expected breeding value in the offspring is the average of the breeding values of the selected parents, which (from Equations 15.22c and 15.23a) yields $$ \\mu_{A}(t+1)=\\frac{A_{m o}^{*}(t)+A_{f a}^{*}(t)}{2}=\\mu_{A}(t)+\\frac{h^{2}}{2-m}\\Biggl(S_{m o}(t)+S_{f a}(t)\\Biggr) $$ (15.23b)"
}

label: Formula 15.24
section: SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS
subsection: Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model
nearby_text: Substituting this result for the average of the breeding values in Equation 15.22b and using $ \mu_{mo}^{*}(t) = \mu_{z}(t) + S_{mo}(t) $ yields $$ \mu_{z}(t+1)=\mu_{A}(t)+\frac{h^{2}}{2-m}\Biggl(S_{m o}(t)+S_{f a}(t)\Biggr)+m\Biggl(\mu_{z}(t)+S_{m o}(t)\Biggr) $$ (15.24)

        "latex": "R=S\\left(h^{2}+\\frac{1}{4}\\frac{\\sigma_{AA}^{2}}{\\sigma_{z}^{2}}+\\frac{1}{16}\\frac{\\sigma_{AAA}^{2}}{\\sigma_{z}^{2}}+\\frac{1}{64}\\frac{\\sigma_{AAAA}^{2}}{\\sigma_{z}^{2}}+\\cdots\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.8",

      {
        "id": "formula_15.11a",
        "latex": "R(T)=\\sum_{t=0}^{T-1}2^{T-t}\\beta_{T,t}S_{t}",
        "label": "Formula 15.11a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",

        ]
      },
      {

        "latex": "R(T)=\\sum_{t=0}^{T-1}2^{T-t}\\frac{\\sigma_{G}(T,t)}{\\sigma^{2}(z_{t})}S_{t}",
        "label": "Formula 15.11b",

        ]
      },
      {

        "label": "Formula 15.11c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.12a",
        "latex": "R(T)=\\sum_{t=0}^{T-1}\\left[\\beta_{T,t}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n(t,T)}S_{t,i}\\right)\\right]",
        "label": "Formula 15.12a",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.12b",
        "latex": "R(T)=\\sum_{t=0}^{T-1}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n(t,T)}\\beta_{T,t,i}S_{t,i}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.12b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",
        "position": 23,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "T"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.13a",
        "latex": "R_{A^{i}}(t)=S\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(A^{i})}{\\sigma_{z}^{2}}\\sum_{\\tau=1}^{t}\\left(\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}}\\right)^{\\tau}",
        "label": "Formula 15.13a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",
        "position": 24,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "R",
          "i",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.13b",
        "latex": "\\sum_{\\tau=1}^{t}\\left(\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}}\\right)^{\\tau}=\\frac{x(1-x^{t})}{1-x},\\quad\\mathrm{w h e r e}\\quad x=(1/2)^{i-1}",
        "label": "Formula 15.13b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",
        "position": 25,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\tau",
          "i",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.13c",
        "latex": "\\frac{x}{1-x}=\\frac{(1/2)^{i-1}}{1-(1/2)^{i-1}}=\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}-1}",
        "label": "Formula 15.13c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",
        "position": 26,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.14a",
        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid z_{m o},z_{f a}\\right]=\\mu+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{f a}-\\mu\\right)+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{m o}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.14a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 27,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "E",
          "a",
          "f",
          "m",
          "o",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.14b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}^{*}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.14b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 28,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.15",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.15",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 29,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 30,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16b",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t}=\\rho^{t}S",
        "label": "Formula 15.16b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 31,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16c",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}R(t)=\\mu_t-\\mu_0=\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\Delta\\mu_i=S\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\rho^i\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 32,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17a",
        "latex": "R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.17a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 33,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17b",
        "latex": "\\widetilde{R}=\\lim_{t\\to\\infty}R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}",
        "label": "Formula 15.17b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\widetilde{R}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.18",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t+\\tau}=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\Delta\\mu_{t}-S\\right)=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\rho^{t}S-S\\right)=-S\\rho^{\\tau}(1-\\rho^{t})",
        "label": "Formula 15.18",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19a",
        "latex": "R(t+\\tau)=R(t)+\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\Delta\\mu_{t+i}=R(t)-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=\\rho^{\\tau}R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19b",
        "latex": "-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=-\\left[R(t)\\frac{1-\\rho}{\\rho}\\right]\\left[\\frac{\\rho(1-\\rho^{\\tau})}{1-\\rho}\\right]=-(1-\\rho^{\\tau})R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 37,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19c",
        "latex": "t_{1/2}=-\\frac{\\ln(2)}{\\ln(\\rho)}",
        "label": "Formula 15.19c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 38,
        "symbols_defined": [

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.20a",
        "latex": "z=G+E=G+M+e",

        "position": 41,
        "symbols_defined": [

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.20b",
        "latex": "z=G+M+e=G_{d}+G_{m}+E_{m}+e",
        "label": "Formula 15.20b",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Decomposing Maternal Effects",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.21",
        "latex": "z=G+M+e=G+m z_{m o}+e",
        "label": "Formula 15.21",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 43,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22a",
        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid A_{mo},A_{fa},z_{mo}\\right]=\\frac{A_{mo}}{2}+\\frac{A_{fa}}{2}+m z_{mo}",
        "label": "Formula 15.22a",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 44,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "E",
          "a",
          "f",
          "m",
          "o",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{z}(t+1)=\\frac{A_{fa}^{*}(t)+A_{mo}^{*}(t)}{2}+m\\mu_{mo}^{*}(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.22b",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 45,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22c",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}A_{mo}^{*}(t)&=E_{s}[A_{mo}(t)]=E_{s}\\left[\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}\\left[z_{mo}-\\mu_{z}(t)\\right]+e\\right]\\\\&=\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}S_{mo}(t)\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.22c",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 46,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "m",
          "o",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.23a",
        "latex": "b_{A|z}=h^{2}\\frac{2}{2-m}",
        "label": "Formula 15.23a",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 47,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "b",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.23b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{A}(t+1)=\\frac{A_{m o}^{*}(t)+A_{f a}^{*}(t)}{2}=\\mu_{A}(t)+\\frac{h^{2}}{2-m}\\Biggl(S_{m o}(t)+S_{f a}(t)\\Biggr)",
        "label": "Formula 15.23b",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 48,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "nearby_text": "Substituting this result for the average of the breeding values in Equation 15.22b and using $ \\mu_{mo}^{*}(t) = \\mu_{z}(t) + S_{mo}(t) $ yields $$ \\mu_{z}(t+1)=\\mu_{A}(t)+\\frac{h^{2}}{2-m}\\Biggl(S_{m o}(t)+S_{f a}(t)\\Biggr)+m\\Biggl(\\mu_{z}(t)+S_{m o}(t)\\Biggr) $$ (15.24)"
}

label: Formula 15.25
section: SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS
subsection: Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model
nearby_text: +S_{mo}(t)\bigg)\Bigg]\\-\Bigg[\mu_{A}(t-1)+\frac{h^{2}}{2-m}\bigg(S_{mo}(t-1)+S_{fa}(t-1)\bigg)+m\bigg(\mu_{z}(t-1)+S_{mo}(t-1)\bigg)\Bigg]\end{align*} $$ which, using Equation 15.23b, simplifies to $$ \begin{align*}\Delta\mu_z(t)={h^2\over2-m}\Big(S_{mo}(t)+S_{fa}(t)\Big)+m S_{mo}(t)+m\Big(\Delta\mu_z(t-1)-S_{mo}(t-1)\Big)\end{align*} $$ (15.25) This result can be interpreted as follows: the first two terms are the change in character value resulting from selection in generation $ t $ due to genetic $ (h^2 / [2 - m]) $ and maternal $ (m) $ c

        "label": "Formula 15.24",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",

}

}

label: Formula 15.27a
section: Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction
subsection: Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model
nearby_text: f Equation 15.26 is that if $m < 0$, there is some possibility of a reversed response, with $\Delta\mu_z$ being opposite in sign from $S$. If $S_{fa} = S_{mo} = S$, a reversed response is expected if $$ m<1-\sqrt{1+2h^{2}} $$ (15.27a)

          "R"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.10a",
        "latex": "R(t)=t h^{2}S+R_{D}(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.10a",
        "section": "GENETIC SOURCES OF TRANSIENT RESPONSE",
        "subsection": "Dominance in Autotetraploids",
        "position": 14,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.10b",
        "latex": "R_{D}(t)=S\\frac{3}{2}\\left[1-\\left(\\frac{1}{3}\\right)^{t}\\right]\\frac{\\sigma_{D}^{2}}{3\\sigma_{z}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula 15.10b",
        "section": "GENETIC SOURCES OF TRANSIENT RESPONSE",
        "subsection": "Dominance in Autotetraploids",
        "position": 15,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "D",
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.10c",
        "latex": "\\widetilde{R}_{D}=S\\left(\\sigma_{D}^{2}/2\\sigma_{z}^{2}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.10c",
        "section": "GENETIC SOURCES OF TRANSIENT RESPONSE",
        "subsection": "Dominance in Autotetraploids",
        "position": 16,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "D",
          "\\widetilde{R}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.10d",
        "latex": "t h^{2}S+(1/3)^{\\tau}R_{D}(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.10d",
        "section": "GENETIC SOURCES OF TRANSIENT RESPONSE",
        "subsection": "Dominance in Autotetraploids",
        "position": 17,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.11a",
        "latex": "R(T)=\\sum_{t=0}^{T-1}2^{T-t}\\beta_{T,t}S_{t}",
        "label": "Formula 15.11a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",
        "position": 19,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "T"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.11b",
        "latex": "R(T)=\\sum_{t=0}^{T-1}2^{T-t}\\frac{\\sigma_{G}(T,t)}{\\sigma^{2}(z_{t})}S_{t}",
        "label": "Formula 15.11b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",
        "position": 20,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "T"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.11c",
        "latex": "R(T)=\\sum_{t=0}^{T-1}\\beta_{T,t}S_{t}",
        "label": "Formula 15.11c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",
        "position": 21,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "T"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.12a",
        "latex": "R(T)=\\sum_{t=0}^{T-1}\\left[\\beta_{T,t}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n(t,T)}S_{t,i}\\right)\\right]",
        "label": "Formula 15.12a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",
        "position": 22,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "T"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.12b",
        "latex": "R(T)=\\sum_{t=0}^{T-1}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n(t,T)}\\beta_{T,t,i}S_{t,i}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.12b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",
        "position": 23,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "T"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.13a",
        "latex": "R_{A^{i}}(t)=S\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(A^{i})}{\\sigma_{z}^{2}}\\sum_{\\tau=1}^{t}\\left(\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}}\\right)^{\\tau}",
        "label": "Formula 15.13a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",
        "position": 24,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "R",
          "i",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.13b",
        "latex": "\\sum_{\\tau=1}^{t}\\left(\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}}\\right)^{\\tau}=\\frac{x(1-x^{t})}{1-x},\\quad\\mathrm{w h e r e}\\quad x=(1/2)^{i-1}",
        "label": "Formula 15.13b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",
        "position": 25,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\tau",
          "i",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.13c",
        "latex": "\\frac{x}{1-x}=\\frac{(1/2)^{i-1}}{1-(1/2)^{i-1}}=\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}-1}",
        "label": "Formula 15.13c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "ANCESTRAL REGRESSIONS",
        "position": 26,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.14a",
        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid z_{m o},z_{f a}\\right]=\\mu+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{f a}-\\mu\\right)+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{m o}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.14a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 27,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "E",
          "a",
          "f",
          "m",
          "o",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.14b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}^{*}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.14b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 28,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.15",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.15",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 29,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 30,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16b",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t}=\\rho^{t}S",
        "label": "Formula 15.16b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 31,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16c",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}R(t)=\\mu_t-\\mu_0=\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\Delta\\mu_i=S\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\rho^i\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 32,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17a",
        "latex": "R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.17a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 33,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17b",
        "latex": "\\widetilde{R}=\\lim_{t\\to\\infty}R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}",
        "label": "Formula 15.17b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\widetilde{R}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.18",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t+\\tau}=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\Delta\\mu_{t}-S\\right)=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\rho^{t}S-S\\right)=-S\\rho^{\\tau}(1-\\rho^{t})",
        "label": "Formula 15.18",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19a",
        "latex": "R(t+\\tau)=R(t)+\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\Delta\\mu_{t+i}=R(t)-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=\\rho^{\\tau}R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19b",
        "latex": "-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=-\\left[R(t)\\frac{1-\\rho}{\\rho}\\right]\\left[\\frac{\\rho(1-\\rho^{\\tau})}{1-\\rho}\\right]=-(1-\\rho^{\\tau})R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 37,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "S",
          "\\rho",
          "\\tau",
          "i",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19c",
        "latex": "t_{1/2}=-\\frac{\\ln(2)}{\\ln(\\rho)}",
        "label": "Formula 15.19c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 38,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.20a",
        "latex": "z=G+E=G+M+e",
        "label": "Formula 15.20a",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Decomposing Maternal Effects",
        "position": 41,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.20b",
        "latex": "z=G+M+e=G_{d}+G_{m}+E_{m}+e",
        "label": "Formula 15.20b",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Decomposing Maternal Effects",
        "position": 42,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.21",
        "latex": "z=G+M+e=G+m z_{m o}+e",
        "label": "Formula 15.21",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 43,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22a",
        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid A_{mo},A_{fa},z_{mo}\\right]=\\frac{A_{mo}}{2}+\\frac{A_{fa}}{2}+m z_{mo}",
        "label": "Formula 15.22a",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 44,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "E",
          "a",
          "f",
          "m",
          "o",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{z}(t+1)=\\frac{A_{fa}^{*}(t)+A_{mo}^{*}(t)}{2}+m\\mu_{mo}^{*}(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.22b",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 45,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22c",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}A_{mo}^{*}(t)&=E_{s}[A_{mo}(t)]=E_{s}\\left[\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}\\left[z_{mo}-\\mu_{z}(t)\\right]+e\\right]\\\\&=\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}S_{mo}(t)\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.22c",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 46,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "m",
          "o",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.23a",
        "latex": "b_{A|z}=h^{2}\\frac{2}{2-m}",
        "label": "Formula 15.23a",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 47,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "b",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.23b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{A}(t+1)=\\frac{A_{m o}^{*}(t)+A_{f a}^{*}(t)}{2}=\\mu_{A}(t)+\\frac{h^{2}}{2-m}\\Biggl(S_{m o}(t)+S_{f a}(t)\\Biggr)",
        "label": "Formula 15.23b",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 48,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.24",
        "latex": "\\mu_{z}(t+1)=\\mu_{A}(t)+\\frac{h^{2}}{2-m}\\Biggl(S_{m o}(t)+S_{f a}(t)\\Biggr)+m\\Biggl(\\mu_{z}(t)+S_{m o}(t)\\Biggr)",
        "label": "Formula 15.24",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 49,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.25",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}\\Delta\\mu_z(t)={h^2\\over2-m}\\Big(S_{mo}(t)+S_{fa}(t)\\Big)+m S_{mo}(t)+m\\Big(\\Delta\\mu_z(t-1)-S_{mo}(t-1)\\Big)\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula 15.25",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 50,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.26",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}\\Delta\\mu_z(1)={h^2\\over2-m}\\bigg(S_{mo}(1)+S_{fa}(1)\\bigg)+mS_{mo}(1)\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula 15.26",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 53,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "z"
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "nearby_text": "f Equation 15.26 is that if $m < 0$, there is some possibility of a reversed response, with $\\Delta\\mu_z$ being opposite in sign from $S$. If $S_{fa} = S_{mo} = S$, a reversed response is expected if $$ m<1-\\sqrt{1+2h^{2}} $$ (15.27a)"
}

label: Formula 15.27b

nearby_text: If selection is only occurring on females, this condition is $$ m<1-\sqrt{1+h^{2}} $$ (15.27b)

label: Formula 15.28a
section: Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction
subsection: Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model
nearby_text: more detail, consider the dilution model with constant directional selection occurring equally on both sexes, i.e., $ S_{fa}(t) = S_{mo}(t) = S $ for $ t \geq 1 $. Iteration of Equation 15.25 yields $$ \Delta\mu_{z}(t)=S\bigg[\frac{2h^{2}}{(1-m)(2-m)}\bigg(1-m^{t}\bigg)+m^{t}\bigg] $$ (15.28a) which (for $ |m|<1 $) converges to $$ \Delta\mu_{z}=S\frac{2h^{2}}{(1-m)(2-m)} $$ (15.28b)

        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",

  "nearby_text": "more detail, consider the dilution model with constant directional selection occurring equally on both sexes, i.e., $ S_{fa}(t) = S_{mo}(t) = S $ for $ t \\geq 1 $. Iteration of Equation 15.25 yields $$ \\Delta\\mu_{z}(t)=S\\bigg[\\frac{2h^{2}}{(1-m)(2-m)}\\bigg(1-m^{t}\\bigg)+m^{t}\\bigg] $$ (15.28a) which (for $ |m|<1 $) converges to $$ \\Delta\\mu_{z}=S\\frac{2h^{2}}{(1-m)(2-m)} $$ (15.28b)"
}

  "nearby_text": "S_{mo}(t) = S $ for $ t \\geq 1 $. Iteration of Equation 15.25 yields $$ \\Delta\\mu_{z}(t)=S\\bigg[\\frac{2h^{2}}{(1-m)(2-m)}\\bigg(1-m^{t}\\bigg)+m^{t}\\bigg] $$ (15.28a) which (for $ |m|<1 $) converges to $$ \\Delta\\mu_{z}=S\\frac{2h^{2}}{(1-m)(2-m)} $$ (15.28b)"

nearby_text: ne, the rate of convergence is considerably slower. Summing over the single-generation changes (Equation 15.28a) and recalling Equation 15.5b, the cumulative response to t generations of selection is $$ R(t)=\sum_{i=1}^{t}\Delta\mu_{z}(i)=\frac{S}{1-m}\bigg[t\frac{2h^{2}}{2-m}+m\left(1-m^{t}\right)\bigg(1-\frac{2h^{2}}{(1-m)(2-m)}\bigg)\bigg] $$ (15.29a) which converges (for $ |m|<1 $) to $$ \frac{S}{1-m}\left[\frac{2h^{2}}{2-m}\left(t-\frac{m}{1-m}\right)+m\right] $$ (15.29b)

Iterating Equation 15.25 with $ S(t) = S $, $ S(t + \tau) = 0 $ for $ \tau \geq 1 $ yields $$ \Delta\mu_{z}(t+\tau)=m^{\tau}\left[\Delta\mu_{z}(t)-S\right] $$ (15.30) where $ \Delta\mu_{z}(t) $ is given by Equation 15.28a. Thus, the selection response continues even after the cessation of selection (Figure 15.3), a feature that Kirkpatrick and Lande (1989) called

  "nearby_text": "t generation $ t $, and suppose we denote by $ \\tau $ the number of generations since selection was stopped. Iterating Equation 15.25 with $ S(t) = S $, $ S(t + \\tau) = 0 $ for $ \\tau \\geq 1 $ yields $$ \\Delta\\mu_{z}(t+\\tau)=m^{\\tau}\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{z}(t)-S\\right] $$ (15.30) where $ \\Delta\\mu_{z}(t) $ is given by Equation 15.28a. Thus, the selection response continues even after the cessation of selection (Figure 15.3), a feature that Kirkpatrick and Lande (1989) called"
}

label: Formula 15.31
section: Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction
subsection: Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model
nearby_text: ture that Kirkpatrick and Lande (1989) called evolutionary momentum. Using Equation 15.5b to sum Equation 15.30 over $ \tau $ yields the cumulative response following the last generation of selection $$ R^{*}(\tau)=\frac{m(1-m^{\tau})}{1-m}\left[\Delta\mu_{z}(t)-S\right] $$ (15.31) which, as $ \tau \rightarrow \infty $, converges to $$ \begin{align*}R^*=S{m\left(1-m^t\right)\over1-m}\left[{2h^2\over(1-m)(2-m)}-1\right]\end{align*} $$ (15.32)

      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",

        "id": "formula_15.14a",
        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid z_{m o},z_{f a}\\right]=\\mu+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{f a}-\\mu\\right)+\\frac{\\rho}{2}\\left(z_{m o}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.14a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 27,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "E",
          "a",
          "f",
          "m",
          "o",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.14b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}^{*}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.14b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 28,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.15",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.15",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 29,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 30,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16b",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t}=\\rho^{t}S",
        "label": "Formula 15.16b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 31,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16c",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}R(t)=\\mu_t-\\mu_0=\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\Delta\\mu_i=S\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\rho^i\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 32,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17a",
        "latex": "R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.17a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 33,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17b",
        "latex": "\\widetilde{R}=\\lim_{t\\to\\infty}R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}",
        "label": "Formula 15.17b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\widetilde{R}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.18",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t+\\tau}=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\Delta\\mu_{t}-S\\right)=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\rho^{t}S-S\\right)=-S\\rho^{\\tau}(1-\\rho^{t})",
        "label": "Formula 15.18",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19a",
        "latex": "R(t+\\tau)=R(t)+\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\Delta\\mu_{t+i}=R(t)-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=\\rho^{\\tau}R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19b",
        "latex": "-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=-\\left[R(t)\\frac{1-\\rho}{\\rho}\\right]\\left[\\frac{\\rho(1-\\rho^{\\tau})}{1-\\rho}\\right]=-(1-\\rho^{\\tau})R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 37,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "S",
          "\\rho",
          "\\tau",
          "i",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19c",
        "latex": "t_{1/2}=-\\frac{\\ln(2)}{\\ln(\\rho)}",
        "label": "Formula 15.19c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 38,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {

      {

        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid A_{mo},A_{fa},z_{mo}\\right]=\\frac{A_{mo}}{2}+\\frac{A_{fa}}{2}+m z_{mo}",
        "label": "Formula 15.22a",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",

      {

        "latex": "\\mu_{z}(t+1)=\\frac{A_{fa}^{*}(t)+A_{mo}^{*}(t)}{2}+m\\mu_{mo}^{*}(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.22b",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22c",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}A_{mo}^{*}(t)&=E_{s}[A_{mo}(t)]=E_{s}\\left[\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}\\left[z_{mo}-\\mu_{z}(t)\\right]+e\\right]\\\\&=\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}S_{mo}(t)\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.22c",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {

        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 47,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "b",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.23b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{A}(t+1)=\\frac{A_{m o}^{*}(t)+A_{f a}^{*}(t)}{2}=\\mu_{A}(t)+\\frac{h^{2}}{2-m}\\Biggl(S_{m o}(t)+S_{f a}(t)\\Biggr)",
        "label": "Formula 15.23b",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 48,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.24",
        "latex": "\\mu_{z}(t+1)=\\mu_{A}(t)+\\frac{h^{2}}{2-m}\\Biggl(S_{m o}(t)+S_{f a}(t)\\Biggr)+m\\Biggl(\\mu_{z}(t)+S_{m o}(t)\\Biggr)",
        "label": "Formula 15.24",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",
        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",
        "position": 49,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.25",

        "label": "Formula 15.25",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",

        "label": "Formula 15.26",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",

label: Formula 15.34b
section: Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction

nearby_text: On the other hand, if maternal effects are either negative $ (m < 0) $ or sufficiently large $$ m>\frac{3-\sqrt{1+8h^{2}}}{2} $$ (15.34b) the response will continue for a few generations following the relaxation of selection. This occurs by the transient component of response decaying away to reveal the actual permanent response due to

        "label": "Formula 15.19a",

        "latex": "\\begin{align*}b_{op}={\\sigma(z_p,z_o)\\over\\sigma_z^2}={1\\over\\sigma_z^2}\\left({\\sigma_A^2\\over2}+{\\sigma_AA^2\\over4}+{\\sigma_AAA^2\\over8}+{\\sigma_AAAA^2\\over16}+\\cdots+\\sigma(E_p,E_o)\\right)\\end{align*}",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",
