        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 29,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 30,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16b",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t}=\\rho^{t}S",
        "label": "Formula 15.16b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 31,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16c",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}R(t)=\\mu_t-\\mu_0=\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\Delta\\mu_i=S\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\rho^i\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 32,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17a",
        "latex": "R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.17a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 33,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17b",
        "latex": "\\widetilde{R}=\\lim_{t\\to\\infty}R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}",
        "label": "Formula 15.17b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\widetilde{R}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.18",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t+\\tau}=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\Delta\\mu_{t}-S\\right)=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\rho^{t}S-S\\right)=-S\\rho^{\\tau}(1-\\rho^{t})",
        "label": "Formula 15.18",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19a",
        "latex": "R(t+\\tau)=R(t)+\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\Delta\\mu_{t+i}=R(t)-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=\\rho^{\\tau}R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19b",
        "latex": "-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=-\\left[R(t)\\frac{1-\\rho}{\\rho}\\right]\\left[\\frac{\\rho(1-\\rho^{\\tau})}{1-\\rho}\\right]=-(1-\\rho^{\\tau})R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 37,
        "symbols_defined": [

      },
      {

        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid A_{mo},A_{fa},z_{mo}\\right]=\\frac{A_{mo}}{2}+\\frac{A_{fa}}{2}+m z_{mo}",
        "label": "Formula 15.22a",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{z}(t+1)=\\frac{A_{fa}^{*}(t)+A_{mo}^{*}(t)}{2}+m\\mu_{mo}^{*}(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.22b",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22c",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}A_{mo}^{*}(t)&=E_{s}[A_{mo}(t)]=E_{s}\\left[\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}\\left[z_{mo}-\\mu_{z}(t)\\right]+e\\right]\\\\&=\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}S_{mo}(t)\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.22c",

        "subsection": "Selection Response Under Falconer's Dilution Model",

        ]
      },

        "label": "Formula 15.23b",

section: SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS
nearby_text: tion. Putting all these together, the joint dynamics obtained by Kirkpatrick and Lande (1989, 1992) are $$ R_{d}(t)=\left(G_{d d}+\frac{m}{2}G_{m d}\right)\beta_{z}(t)+G_{m d}\beta_{m}(t) $$ (15.36a) $$ R_{m}(t)=\left(G_{md}+\frac{m}{2}G_{mm}\right)\beta_{z}(t)+G_{mm}\beta_{m}(t) $$ (15.36b) $$ R_{z}(t)=R_{d}(t)+mR_{m}(t-1)+m\left[P_{mm}\Delta\beta_{m}(t-1)+P_{mz}\Delta\beta_{z}(t-1)\right] $$ (15.36c)

        "latex": "\\begin{align*}b_{op}={\\sigma(z_p,z_o)\\over\\sigma_z^2}={1\\over\\sigma_z^2}\\left({\\sigma_A^2\\over2}+{\\sigma_AA^2\\over4}+{\\sigma_AAA^2\\over8}+{\\sigma_AAAA^2\\over16}+\\cdots+\\sigma(E_p,E_o)\\right)\\end{align*}",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",

nearby_text: tion differentials following the start of selection, so that (after the first generation) terms involving $ \Delta\beta $ (changes in $ \beta $) are zero. Equations 15.36b and 15.36c then simplify to $$ \begin{aligned}R_{m}(t)&=\left(G_{md}+\frac{m}{2}G_{mm}\right)\beta_{z}+G_{mm}\beta_{m}&(\text{ⅰ }\\R_{z}(t)&=\left(G_{dd}+\frac{m}{2}G_{md}\right)\beta_{z}+G_{md}\beta_{m}+mR_{m}(t-1)\\&=\left(G_{dd}+\frac{m}{2}G_{md}\right)\beta_{z}+G_{md}\beta_{m}+m\left[\left(G_{md}+\frac{m}{2}G_{mm}\right)\beta_{z}+G_{mm}\beta_{m}\right]\\&=\left(G_{dd}+\frac{3m}{2}G_{md}+\frac{m^{2}}{2}G_{mm}\right)\beta_{z}+\left(G_{md}+mG_{mm}\right)\beta_{m}&(1^{\prime}\text{ⅰ })\end{aligned} $$ (15.37b)

        "latex": "R_{A^{i}}(t)=S\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(A^{i})}{\\sigma_{z}^{2}}\\sum_{\\tau=1}^{t}\\left(\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}}\\right)^{\\tau}",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",

        "latex": "R_{A^{i}}(t)=S\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(A^{i})}{\\sigma_{z}^{2}}\\sum_{\\tau=1}^{t}\\left(\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}}\\right)^{\\tau}",

      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",

nearby_text: The assumption of selection only on the direct trait implies that $ \beta_{z}=S_{z}/\sigma_{z}^{2} $, yielding $$ R_{z}=\left(h_{d}^{2}+\frac{3}{2}\frac{G_{m d}}{\sigma_{z}^{2}}+\frac{G_{m m}}{2\sigma_{z}^{2}}\right)S_{z} $$ (15.38c) as $ h_d^2 = G_{dd}/\sigma_z^2 $. This is the Dickerson-Willham model of the selection response in the presence of heritable maternal effects (Chapter 22), which can also be expressed in terms of a t

        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}^{*}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.14b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.15",
        "latex": "\\mu_{t+1}=\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)",
        "label": "Formula 15.15",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 29,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 30,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16b",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t}=\\rho^{t}S",

        "position": 31,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Delta",
          "\\mu",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.16c",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}R(t)=\\mu_t-\\mu_0=\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\Delta\\mu_i=S\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^t\\rho^i\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 32,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17a",

        "label": "Formula 15.17a",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.17b",

        "label": "Formula 15.17b",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.18",

        "label": "Formula 15.18",

        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19a",
        "latex": "R(t+\\tau)=R(t)+\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\Delta\\mu_{t+i}=R(t)-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=\\rho^{\\tau}R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19a",

        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19b",
        "latex": "-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=-\\left[R(t)\\frac{1-\\rho}{\\rho}\\right]\\left[\\frac{\\rho(1-\\rho^{\\tau})}{1-\\rho}\\right]=-(1-\\rho^{\\tau})R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19b",

      {
        "id": "formula_15.22c",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}A_{mo}^{*}(t)&=E_{s}[A_{mo}(t)]=E_{s}\\left[\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}\\left[z_{mo}-\\mu_{z}(t)\\right]+e\\right]\\\\&=\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}S_{mo}(t)\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.22c",

        "id": "formula_15.37b",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}R_{m}(t)&=\\left(G_{md}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{mm}\\beta_{m}&(\\text{ⅰ }\\\\R_{z}(t)&=\\left(G_{dd}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{md}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{md}\\beta_{m}+mR_{m}(t-1)\\\\&=\\left(G_{dd}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{md}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{md}\\beta_{m}+m\\left[\\left(G_{md}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{mm}\\beta_{m}\\right]\\\\&=\\left(G_{dd}+\\frac{3m}{2}G_{md}+\\frac{m^{2}}{2}G_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{z}+\\left(G_{md}+mG_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{m}&(1^{\\prime}\\text{ⅰ })\\end{aligned}",

This is the Dickerson-Willham model of the selection response in the presence of heritable maternal effects (Chapter 22), which can also be expressed in terms of a t"
}

label: Formula 15.38d
section: SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS
nearby_text: d}/\sigma_z^2 $. This is the Dickerson-Willham model of the selection response in the presence of heritable maternal effects (Chapter 22), which can also be expressed in terms of a total heritability $$ h_{T}^{2}=\frac{G_{d d}+1.5G_{m d}+0.5G_{m}}{\sigma_{z}^{2}}=\frac{\sigma^{2}(A_{d})+1.5\sigma(A_{d},A_{m})+0.5\sigma^{2}(A_{m})}{\sigma_{z}^{2}} $$ (15.38d) yielding the response as $$ R_{z}=h_{T}^{2}S_{z} $$ (15.38e)

      {

        "label": "Formula 15.22c",

        "latex": "R_{z}(t)=R_{d}(t)+mR_{m}(t-1)+m\\left[P_{mm}\\Delta\\beta_{m}(t-1)+P_{mz}\\Delta\\beta_{z}(t-1)\\right]",

        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.37b",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}R_{m}(t)&=\\left(G_{md}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{mm}\\beta_{m}&(\\text{ⅰ }\\\\R_{z}(t)&=\\left(G_{dd}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{md}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{md}\\beta_{m}+mR_{m}(t-1)\\\\&=\\left(G_{dd}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{md}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{md}\\beta_{m}+m\\left[\\left(G_{md}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{mm}\\beta_{m}\\right]\\\\&=\\left(G_{dd}+\\frac{3m}{2}G_{md}+\\frac{m^{2}}{2}G_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{z}+\\left(G_{md}+mG_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{m}&(1^{\\prime}\\text{ⅰ })\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.37b",

  "nearby_text": "d}/\\sigma_z^2 $. This is the Dickerson-Willham model of the selection response in the presence of heritable maternal effects (Chapter 22), which can also be expressed in terms of a total heritability $$ h_{T}^{2}=\\frac{G_{d d}+1.5G_{m d}+0.5G_{m}}{\\sigma_{z}^{2}}=\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(A_{d})+1.5\\sigma(A_{d},A_{m})+0.5\\sigma^{2}(A_{m})}{\\sigma_{z}^{2}} $$ (15.38d) yielding the response as $$ R_{z}=h_{T}^{2}S_{z} $$ (15.38e)"
}

      {
        "id": "formula_15.17b",
        "latex": "\\widetilde{R}=\\lim_{t\\to\\infty}R(t)=S\\frac{\\rho}{1-\\rho}",
        "label": "Formula 15.17b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.18",
        "latex": "\\Delta\\mu_{t+\\tau}=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\Delta\\mu_{t}-S\\right)=\\rho^{\\tau}\\left(\\rho^{t}S-S\\right)=-S\\rho^{\\tau}(1-\\rho^{t})",
        "label": "Formula 15.18",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\mu",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19a",
        "latex": "R(t+\\tau)=R(t)+\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\Delta\\mu_{t+i}=R(t)-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=\\rho^{\\tau}R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "R",
          "\\tau",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.19b",
        "latex": "-S\\left(1-\\rho^{t}\\right)\\sum_{i=1}^{\\tau}\\rho^{i}=-\\left[R(t)\\frac{1-\\rho}{\\rho}\\right]\\left[\\frac{\\rho(1-\\rho^{\\tau})}{1-\\rho}\\right]=-(1-\\rho^{\\tau})R(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.19b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Mean: 3. Permanent Versus Transient Response: Introduction",
        "subsection": "RESPONSE DUE TO ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22a",
        "latex": "E\\left[z_{o}\\mid A_{mo},A_{fa},z_{mo}\\right]=\\frac{A_{mo}}{2}+\\frac{A_{fa}}{2}+m z_{mo}",

      {
        "id": "formula_15.22b",
        "latex": "\\mu_{z}(t+1)=\\frac{A_{fa}^{*}(t)+A_{mo}^{*}(t)}{2}+m\\mu_{mo}^{*}(t)",
        "label": "Formula 15.22b",
        "section": "SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.22c",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}A_{mo}^{*}(t)&=E_{s}[A_{mo}(t)]=E_{s}\\left[\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}\\left[z_{mo}-\\mu_{z}(t)\\right]+e\\right]\\\\&=\\mu_{A}(t)+b_{A|z}S_{mo}(t)\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.22c",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_15.37b",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}R_{m}(t)&=\\left(G_{md}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{mm}\\beta_{m}&(\\text{ⅰ }\\\\R_{z}(t)&=\\left(G_{dd}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{md}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{md}\\beta_{m}+mR_{m}(t-1)\\\\&=\\left(G_{dd}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{md}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{md}\\beta_{m}+m\\left[\\left(G_{md}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{mm}\\beta_{m}\\right]\\\\&=\\left(G_{dd}+\\frac{3m}{2}G_{md}+\\frac{m^{2}}{2}G_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{z}+\\left(G_{md}+mG_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{m}&(1^{\\prime}\\text{ⅰ })\\end{aligned}",

        "label": "Formula 15.38d",

label: Formula 15.39a
section: SELECTION IN THE PRESENCE OF HERITABLE MATERNAL EFFECTS
nearby_text: function of its current phenotype, $ z_{i} $, and the phenotype of the same trait, $ z_{mo_{i}} $, in its mother. The linear regression predicting i's relative fitness (e.g., Equation 13.25b) becomes $$ w_{i}=1+\left(\beta_{z}\cdot z_{i}\right)+\left(\beta_{m s}\cdot z_{m o_{i}}\right)+e_{i} $$ (15.39a)

nearby_text: imply half the additive genetic variance in the trait (LW Chapter 7), yielding $ \sigma(z_i, z_{mo_i}) = \sigma_A^2 / 2 $.       {
        "id": "formula_15.16a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\mu_{t}&=\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t}+S_{t}-\\mu\\right)\\right]-\\left[\\mu+\\rho\\left(\\mu_{t-1}+S_{t-1}-\\mu\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\left(\\mu_{t}-\\mu_{t-1}\\right)+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=\\rho\\left[\\Delta\\mu_{t-1}+\\left(S_{t}-S_{t-1}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 15.16a",

        "id": "formula_15.37b",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}R_{m}(t)&=\\left(G_{md}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{mm}\\beta_{m}&(\\text{ⅰ }\\\\R_{z}(t)&=\\left(G_{dd}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{md}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{md}\\beta_{m}+mR_{m}(t-1)\\\\&=\\left(G_{dd}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{md}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{md}\\beta_{m}+m\\left[\\left(G_{md}+\\frac{m}{2}G_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{z}+G_{mm}\\beta_{m}\\right]\\\\&=\\left(G_{dd}+\\frac{3m}{2}G_{md}+\\frac{m^{2}}{2}G_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{z}+\\left(G_{md}+mG_{mm}\\right)\\beta_{m}&(1^{\\prime}\\text{ⅰ })\\end{aligned}",

        "latex": "\\sum_{\\tau=1}^{t}\\left(\\frac{1}{2^{i-1}}\\right)^{\\tau}=\\frac{x(1-x^{t})}{1-x},\\quad\\mathrm{w h e r e}\\quad x=(1/2)^{i-1}",
